dialogos.texto_en: Zzz... Zzz...
*snore*
(Huh?\n What? Was there a noise?)
(A knocking sound?)
(It's not morning yet.\n Who could it be and what do they want...?)
(Alright, alright.\n I'll open the door, wait a second.)
Good evening, Futaro.
...Wha?
It's not a good idea to stand around here talking.\nLet me into your room first.
What the—?!\nHey, wait! Nino?!
I said WAIT!\nWhat were you thinking?!
What do you mean...?
Coming to a man's room this late at night...\nDo you realize what would happen if someone saw you?
I do realize.\nI AM aware of what I am doing, without being told.
Huh?
I couldn't help myself,\nI was thinking about you the whole time and couldn't sleep.
Because you're sleeping so close to my room.\nIt's only natural that I came over...
(Seriously...?!\n I knew she was quick to act when she makes up her mind,\n but I didn't expect her to go this far!)
Nino, calm down and listen to what I have to say.
I'm already calm.
Just listen.\nGo back to your room right away.
...Why?\nWhy do I have to go back?
Why do you think?\nWell...you know, right?
(I can tell what that face means.\n She doesn't intend to back down.)
A-anyway!\nIchika would be worried\nif she realized you weren't here.
That girl won't wake up once she falls asleep,\nso it's alright.
Hey, Futaro,\ndo you hate being with me that much?
It's not about whether I like you or not!
That's the problem!\nI came over to your room because I wanted to be with you,\nand you say something like that! It's cruel!
Nino, I told you to calm down, didn't I?\nTry to think it through.
Your dad let us come on this trip because he trusted us.\nDo you plan on betraying that trust?
What?! Do you think you can just talk your way out\nand cool things down?\nI just want to be with you!
But coming here in the middle of the night\nisn't reasonable.
...You don't get it, Futaro.
EEEEP!
Do you understand what you're doing?
I know, I know, but I just had to see you no matter what.
You understand that my feelings for you\nbrought me here...don't you, Futaro?
And, those are...
You get it, right?
Listen, Nino.\nI never intend to disregard your feelings.
But I just can't betray your father,\nwho trusted us and sent us on this graduation trip.
...Ugh.\nYou're such a dork, Futaro...
EEEEP!
I have no reason to hate being with you.
In that case...!
It's not that I hate you,\nbut that's exactly why we can't do this.\nI don't want to act on impulse and regret it later.
I just want to be with you, Futaro.
I feel the same way...\nNo matter how much time we have,\nit's never enough, is it?
...That's it.
EEEEP!
Wh-what?\nWas that your phone, Futaro?
Yeah, probably a message.\nWait a sec.
...It's from Ichika.
Huh...?
Nino isn't here,\ndid she perhaps go to your room, Futaro-kun?
...Is what it says.
I can't believe that Ichika is up at this time of night.
That's the eldest sister's intuition speaking.\nPlease go back before your disappearance causes a scene.
...Got it.\nGood night.
Yeah, see you tomorrow.
...Whew.
(Whew, I'm glad she went back without a fuss.\n I'm sure she knew deep down that coming over was wrong.)
(But still, I've let her slip into the room.\n This was probably just me panicking...)
Holy cow...\nI'm so pathetic...
(But, thank goodness.\n What would have happened, \n if Ichika hadn't contacted us first? Her timing was perfect...)
(Wait, could it be that Ichika noticed\n when Nino left the room\n and timed her message on purpose?)
(If it's her, it's possible.\n And the purpose...is to give me time to reflect\n on my own pathetic behavior, right?)
Son of a monkey, she got me...
